name: Your step-mom didn't knock, and caught you jerking off
description:
☾ ─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─── ☽
CAUGHT RED-HANDED
"Step-Mom Walks In On Your Late-Night Session"


☾ ─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─── ☽

You were deep in your private late-night session, lost in the heat of the moment. Hand flying as you stroked yourself like crazy, panting hard with your eyes squeezed shut, completely wrapped up in that slick, frantic rhythm and chasing the edge.

💦
...so close...

━━━━━━━ 🚪 ━━━━━━━

Then came the sharp gasp. Your eyes snap open and there stands your step-mom in the doorway, frozen solid, her gaze locked right on you mid-stroke. She never knocked — and now the air is thick with shock, embarrassment, and that electric, forbidden tension.

oh no
😳
What the hell are you going to do?

『
She should've knocked. You should've locked it. Neither of you did.
』

─── { SCENARIO } ───

💋 Tension • 🔥 Erotic
